name: Belleville High School
description: Come play pickleball at Belleville High School in Belleville, NJ! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Berkeley Tennis Club
description: Berkeley Tennis Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in City of Orange, NJ. The court surface is clay. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Brookdale Park
description: Come play pickleball at Brookdale Park in Bloomfield, NJ! There are 8 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts cannot be reserved.
